backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the e-commerce backend; defines types for products, orders, vendors, and users, and exposes shared functions for Stripe checkout, order management, vendor/product CRUD, cart operations, and access-controlled admin actions.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old actor state (with a simpler order schema) to the new schema by adding paymentStatus, paymentSessionId, createdAt, updatedAt, statusHistory, and paymentHistory fields to each order.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three implemented features—admin order status updates, real-time order tracking UI, and PaymentSuccess confirmation flow—with their associated files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key changes, serving as a reference for build planning and code review.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom properties for the light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the application.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Fragrance.Intl React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (including /payment/success and /payment/cancel), wraps the app in a ThemeProvider, and renders the shared Header/Footer layout with a profile setup modal.
frontend/src/components/admin/ApprovalDa: Admin dashboard component that lists user approval requests and allows admins to approve or reject pending users via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrderManag: Admin panel for viewing and managing all orders, with status filtering, sorting by date, and inline status update controls.
frontend/src/components/admin/RoleAssign: Form component that lets admins assign a role (admin, user, or guest) to a user by entering their Principal ID.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing a loading state during authentication.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog shown to new users to collect their name and optional email to complete profile setup after authentication.
frontend/src/components/cart/CartDropdow: Popover cart icon in the navbar that shows item count and a preview of cart contents with a link to the full cart page.
frontend/src/components/cart/CartItemRow: Row component for a single cart item displaying product info, quantity controls, line total, and a remove button.
frontend/src/components/cart/CartSummary: Sticky order summary sidebar showing subtotal, shipping note, total price, and buttons to proceed to checkout or continue shopping.
frontend/src/components/checkout/OrderRe: Displays a checkout order review panel with cart items, subtotal, optional shipping address summary, and a Stripe payment button that is disabled until shipping info is complete.
frontend/src/components/checkout/Shippin: Renders a controlled form for collecting a shipping address (street, city, state, ZIP, country) with a country dropdown and required field indicators.
frontend/src/components/common/AccessDen: Displays an access-denied message with a shield icon and an optional link back to the home page.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Site footer with brand logo, marketplace navigation links, legal placeholders, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Sticky site header with logo, desktop navigation (Shop, My Orders, vendor/admin links based on auth state), cart dropdown, and a user profile dropdown menu.
frontend/src/components/layout/HeroBanne: Full-width hero banner with a background image, gradient overlay, headline copy, and CTA buttons linking to the shop and vendor registration pages.
frontend/src/components/orders/OrderStat: Renders a color-coded badge for an order status (pending, processing, shipped, delivered, canceled) using a predefined style map.
Renders a horizontal step timeline showing order progress through pending, processing, shipped, and delivered stages, with a special canceled state view.
frontend/src/components/products/Product: Renders a single product card with image, type badge, price, stock info, and an 'Add to Cart' button that requires authentication and calls the cart mutation.
Displays a responsive grid of ProductCard components with loading skeleton states and an empty-state message when no products are found.
frontend/src/components/products/SearchF: Provides a search input plus category, product type, and sort-order selects for filtering the product listing, with a clear-all button when filters are active.
frontend/src/components/vendor/ProductFo: Form for creating or editing a product (title, description, price, category, type, stock, optional image upload with progress) that calls create/update mutations on submit.
frontend/src/components/vendor/ProductLi: Vendor dashboard component that lists the vendor's products with edit and delete actions, and opens a dialog with ProductForm for adding or editing products.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorPro: Form for editing a vendor's store profile fields (name, description, contact, logo upload with progress) that calls the update vendor profile mutation on submit.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorReg: A multi-field React form for vendor registration that collects store ID, name, description, contact, and optional logo, then calls createVendorProfile and requestApproval mutations, storing the vendor ID in localStorage on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating all dependent queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage Internet Computer authentication via AuthClient, exposing identity, login/clear functions, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for interacting with the backend actor, covering user profiles, roles, approvals, vendor profiles, products, cart, and orders.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a luxury fragrance-themed design system with OKLCH CSS custom properties for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin-only page that renders vendor approval, role assignment, and order management panels, showing an access denied state for unauthenticated or non-admin users.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Shopping cart page that fetches cart items and product data, rendering a list of CartItemRow components alongside a CartSummary, with empty-state and authentication guards.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Checkout page that collects shipping address for physical products, places an order, creates a Stripe checkout session, and redirects the user to Stripe for payment.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page displaying a hero banner, a features section, and a grid of up to 8 featured products sorted by price descending.
frontend/src/pages/MyOrders.tsx: Authenticated page listing the current user's orders in reverse chronological order with status badges, totals, and links to order details.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Order detail/confirmation page that shows a success banner, status timeline, itemized order summary, and navigation actions for a specific order by ID.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentCancel.tsx: Payment cancellation landing page shown after a Stripe checkout is cancelled, displaying the order reference and buttons to return to cart or continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Payment success landing page that confirms the Stripe payment via the session ID, shows a loading/error/success state, and auto-navigates to the order confirmation page after 3 seconds.
frontend/src/pages/ProductListing.tsx: Product listing page with search/filter controls and a product grid that fetches and displays all products matching the current filter state.
frontend/src/pages/VendorDashboard.tsx: Vendor dashboard page that displays store status, a link to product management, and a profile editor; requires authentication and retrieves the vendor profile using a localStorage-stored vendor ID.
frontend/src/pages/VendorProducts.tsx: Vendor products page that guards access by identity and approval status, then renders the ProductListManager component using the stored vendor ID from localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/VendorRegistration.ts: Vendor registration page that shows a registration form for unapproved users, a pending confirmation screen after submission, and a redirect prompt for already-approved vendors.
frontend/src/utils/stripe.ts: Utility module for Stripe Checkout integration providing helpers to build success/cancel redirect URLs and parse the checkout session JSON returned from the backend.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing) and storing/retrieving sensitive parameters via sessionStorage.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a luxury-themed design system with custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), OKLCH-based color tokens (gold, bronze, cream), custom shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking the Fragrance.Intl Marketplace build plan, listing existing implemented features and pending feature requests covering order lifecycle management, Stripe payment confirmation, and a data migration module.
